text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo, time for food! I've been looking forward
to this since this morning! ♪
choice_data_list: What's got you in such a good mood today?
What's got you in such a good mood today?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I got a special food ticket for helping out
at the cafeteria the other day.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They're offering two different items, and I can use
this ticket to redeem whichever I want.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it's a rare opportunity! I can't wait to see
what they're serving!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Special menu, special menu... Oh!
There it is! All the way down in the corner.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the first one is called... "Lovely Angel ☆"?!
Er... "Heartful Jiggly-Wiggly Pudding"...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wh-who the heck comes up with this stuff?! It
looks tasty, sure, but there's no way I can order
that out loud!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Okay, what's the other one called? "Hellfire
Inferno Tartarus Curry"?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That sounds dangerously spicy! And look what's
written underneath. "Fewer than five people have
ever managed to finish this meal." Oh man!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What a name. It'd be awesome to get into the hall of fame as one of the only people who actually managed to eat it... but I'm guessing it's real spicy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Then again, that L-Lovely Angel Pudding thing
sounds good too...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Arrrgh! Which one do I choose?!
choice_data_list: Conquer the fires of spicy hell!

It's important to treat yourself to something
sweet once in a while!

It's important to treat yourself to something
sweet once in a while!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Arrrgh! Which one do I choose?!
choice_data_list: Conquer the fires of spicy hell!

It's important to treat yourself to something
sweet once in a while!

It's important to treat yourself to something
sweet once in a while!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Sh-should I really?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What? No! I'm not scared or anything! These are
happy quivers! All right, I'll take on the curry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka valiantly takes on the challenge of eating
the face-melting curry!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Gaaaaah! It's s-so hot!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
D-dammit! My vision's all blurry from the tears...
I-I don't know if I can actually do this!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? What are you giving me? Oh, milk! That's
right, they say milk's better than water for spicy
food!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! This'll definitely keep my engine
from overheating! Now I can finish this!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Raaah! I'm back in business, baby! Time to polish
off this curry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka sweats bullets as she struggles through her
meal, but manages to clean her plate!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Phew! My mouth's still burning, but at least now
I'll be forever acknowledged as one of the victors
who conquered this curry!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But of course, I couldn't have done it without
your support, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I ever find myself in a pinch, I'm gonna be
counting on you to help me out, just like you did
today, okay?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Graaah! I don't care how spicy this curry is, if I eat
it all before it starts burning, this'll be a piece
of—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wait, what? Th-this is... sp-SP-SPICYYY!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... My mouth's on fire! I've really done it
this time...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man... I couldn't even manage to eat half of it...
That's so not cool...
choice_data_list: That was a great effort, though!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Thanks... Still, it's pretty pathetic that the spice
level kept me from even finishing it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Dammit! If I ever get another chance, I'm gonna
devour every last bite! I'll get you next time,
Hellfire Inferno Tartarus Curry!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... You know what? You're right. Forcing
myself to eat the curry just to look cool would
actually be kinda lame.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I-I mean, it's not like I specifically want to eat that pudding or anything. I just haven't had anything sweet in a while.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello there, Vodka! What will you be having
today?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Um, can I get the item written in the bottom
corner, please?

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text: Hm? Which one's that?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Th-the, uh... You know... Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
C-can I please have th-the Lovely Angel ☆
Heartful Jiggly-Wiggly Pudding?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, that was so embarrassing! You don't see
Scarlet around here, do you? I'll never hear the
end of it if she heard me asking for that...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man, I was so excited to use that ticket... I had no
idea it was a ticket to shame...
choice_data_list: The pudding was good, though, right?
The pudding was good, though, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Well... Yeah, I guess. It was about as tasty
as its name was ridiculous.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So, yeah... I guess it was pretty good.
